arcs.title: The Hollow Crown Expedition
arcs.summary: Christine and Steve descended into the hollow below the first arch and discovered a second, smaller, entirely unmapped arch that frames a shaft of morning light at ten past eight. Ministry cartographers are embarrassed. The flat stone shelf at the bottom appears significant — smooth, central, and deliberately flat in a way that feels less geological and more purposeful. Tomorrow: the final day on the ridge; what the shelf is for, and whether the hollow yields one last thing before they turn the Jeep toward home.
